data.body: S3 plan-review BLOCK remediated: added auth_jwt_jwks_timeout (default 10s, passed to PyJWKClient) for E2/F1 timeout finding; specified asyncio.Lock-guarded atomic check-and-update for the unknown-kid cooldown TOCTOU (G6) + asyncio.to_thread offload of the blocking JWKS fetch; enumerated the symmetric-alg set {HS256/384/512} (T8). Re-running S3 review.
